title: FREE ON THE OUTSIDE HOUSING - 211info
text: FREE ON THE OUTSIDE FREE ON THE OUTSIDE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transitional housing and sober living facilities. Clients may not use illegal drugs or alcohol during their stay. 529 Molalla Avenue Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Anyone experiencing housing instability. Does not turn people away for their criminal history or credit. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 383-1834 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (503) 383-1834 Intake (503) 867-3157 Men's Mike Cross Intake (503) 332-5312 Women, Couples, Families Caryn Ficker Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text to schedule a pre-screening Men's intake: Contact Mike Women, couples, and families intake: Contact Caryn FEES: One-time program fee $200. Rent starts at $550 a month for a shared room, and single rooms are available starting at $700 a month. Funding from outside sources is accepted. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income or promissory note from funding agency and proof of legal name AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus 32 stops at 500 Block Molalla Avenue Services: Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Ex-Offender Reentry Programs Sober Living Homes Transitional Housing/Shelter Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FREE ON THE OUTSIDE
